Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Damn, it's cold. But of course, you never miss a day of school, huh? I'm impressed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Man, this year really flew by... We're practically third-years now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Only one more year of high school... Ya think there's anything interesting on the horizon?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Lookin' at the current third-years, I'm not really sure...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Pretty much all they do is frickin' study. Sure doesn't look like fun to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}Is that what we're gonna turn into next year...? Man, why do I feel like I'm forgetting something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Lookin' at the current third-years, I'm not really sure...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Pretty much all they do is frickin' study. Sure doesn't look like fun to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}Is that what we're gonna turn into next year...? Man, why do I feel like I'm forgetting something?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}Dude, she's pretty cute! How come I never noticed her before?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}What are you talking about? She lives in the same dorm as us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Sheesh, then you barely know more than me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Anyway, it's always crazy in the dorms this time of year, with so many people coming and going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Oh yeah, did you hear? Sanada-senpai's movin' out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}You know him, right? He's the captain of the boxing team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Yeah, not that I really talk to him. And obviously all the graduates are leaving.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Kirijo-senpai is getting ready to move, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Kirijo... Oh, the student council president. She's in our dorm too, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Man, what's up with that girl?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}She looked like she had somethin' on her mind, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Wait, d'you think she might be interested in one of us!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...Man, you really know how to hit a guy where it hurts...[n]{f 1 1}
